defaults.ptx_feature: PTX ISA 8.6 minimum; CUDA 13.3 emits PTX 9.3

stages.representation: three convergent NVVM IR 2.0 inline-PTX kernels covering the admitted tcgen05 commit and shift controls
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 libNVVM retained three entries and the three exact instructions from the 1,180-byte source (SHA-256 c9d6009791b64f0871bf7d007d85d381ba94d1125070ebcdac4c7f0fcb652e13). PTX SHA-256: compute_100a 0b0bffdde9ac419ddef9aa2dfab0a88d7478e27860e804fcbbfef332c1920754; compute_103a 9019c74a58c6077102fc2223da9f67b52850f4df7ad73cf7784e05009f86b65e; compute_110a e1b1bd804b6201a86a382021b60dbaf141e3aac10dbc7c26f12ad98f80322910. The separate direct-intrinsic fixture also succeeded on those targets, with PTX SHA-256 4c535d8f76a09ef5d2b38f07f6a1f1a4dda5afc4e0540f89b987f7e5a0cb3c4f, a3500c104fce6291d8e1b3badc091085078d499f72b508eb5598cc12d1f30954, and fd38746edac8a01e45d978db36999ca83a1132ba18b4327bfbb54c2f1413f44c, in target order.
stages.tool_version: CUDA toolkit 13.3; libNVVM 2.0; NVVM IR 2.0; debug IR 3.2; release V13.3.33

stages.representation: the same NVVM IR 2.0 fixture requested for unavailable and excluded direct-intrinsic targets
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 libNVVM rejected compute_101a/f with NVVM_ERROR_INVALID_OPTION. Direct shift intrinsics rejected compute_100f, compute_103f, and compute_110f as unsupported operations; the commit intrinsic separately passed those family targets. Direct forms of all three records rejected base targets and compute_120/121. The shared libNVVM route is closed to compute_100a, compute_103a, and compute_110a.

stages.representation: libNVVM-produced PTX containing the three exact tcgen05 controls
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 ptxas accepted sm_100a, sm_103a, and sm_110a. Cubin SHA-256: 88743111f57596a0c77bafe054764c63b5dafe8f4a72a49e35aabe41865feeba; 8e50db9432c58adb4ed83badb4984720f7592aeba322ff3b97740e0caf31c486; cdead147e86914c22f5fde7a325f142c2e88f0dc56a8261056937eadeb9bec24, in target order. Each cubin has one UTCBAR.MULTICAST, one UTCSHIFT.DOWN, and one UTCSHIFT.2CTA.DOWN. Isolated commit PTX also assembled on sm_100f, sm_103f, and sm_110f; isolated shifts did not.

stages.representation: the same three inline instructions emitted for excluded family and future targets
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 ptxas rejected tcgen05.shift on sm_100f, sm_103f, and sm_110f. It rejected tcgen05.commit and tcgen05.shift on sm_120a/f and sm_121a/f.

stages.representation: libNVVM LTOIR linked with all three inline-PTX kernels retained through llvm.used
stages.detail: LTOIR SHA-256: sm_100a c79c3b541a41faa35ff05353e8aa7738b7db3201c59cd0403fb4f888d622555e; sm_103a 8563b5b7b21a1a4161aa9216bbd707fe22224815ada8a79928d4279cc00fe84c; sm_110a fcccad4be6c5d7e623a49876d7ba8859ab08dff720682d7a3d713432ab2aea4a. nvJitLink cubin SHA-256: 73e1691afa49d02c15f8cb938e9ec1f12c8464cf4f74749f9ffa48cf4974500a; 420c4fd951b26f081a34d73aaa0160acfb4f999fbf5e809bb450eb3b958bda35; ceeaf53f9251c600daef97387490e636b3403e85a51af33133f51cadada21658, in target order. Every linked cubin retains one UTCBAR.MULTICAST, one UTCSHIFT.DOWN, and one UTCSHIFT.2CTA.DOWN.
